summary: Comprehensive testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD completed successfully. All major features working correctly after JS externalization fix.

design_issues.issue: Shows 4G instead of 5G as expected in requirements

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns success with banbansports message
Backend API /api/scores/live returns TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA correctly
Frontend loads with banbansports logo and TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA scoreboard
REKLAM tab click sets video src to reklam.mp4
beIN SPORTS 1 click shows maintenance overlay (visible, not hidden)
Quality selector AUTO button visible in video controls
Volume slider input range present in video controls
Match center with 7 league filter buttons working
15 sponsor logos loading from Google Favicons API
Server switching works (server 2 active class change verified)
SESİ AÇ unmute button visible and functional
All backend APIs responding with 100% success rate
External app.js file loading and functions properly bound to window scope
